old_value: {"id":"typeweaver-crk","title":"Corrective UX pass for homepage and tool evidence wall","description":"Rework the homepage into visual proof blocks, rebuild /tool into an automatic evidence wall, add truthful registry-asset preview support, and ship the validation-backed frontend update.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"aronchick@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-14T05:19:52Z","created_by":"Aaron Aronchick","updated_at":"2026-03-14T05:19:52Z"}

{"id":"typeweaver-722","title":"Add palette stress section to redesign homepage","description":"Add an integrated visual section to the TypeWeaver redesign showing how the same font behaves across multiple color systems, with triptych organization and minimal evidence-first copy. Includes nearby homepage layout adjustments, frontend validation, and shipping directly to origin/main.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"aronchick@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-14T15:32:46Z","created_by":"Aaron Aronchick","updated_at":"2026-03-14T15:32:46Z"}

{"id":"typeweaver-4ds","title":"Apply product-shape frontend update","description":"Update the live TypeWeaver frontend to emphasize upload-or-URL font input, remove debug/jargon copy, make the page itself become the live specimen after font load, sweep headline wrapping, validate, and push to origin/main.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"aronchick@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-14T15:37:11Z","created_by":"Aaron Aronchick","updated_at":"2026-03-14T15:37:11Z"}
